meaning: n.吕宋岛(菲律宾主要岛屿)
examples: With this agreement, the rebellion ended on the island of Luzon.
I took 33 actors into the mountains of Central Luzon in the Philippines for three weeks, completely cut off from the outside world.
Seven new species of mammals have just been discovered at Luzon Island in the Philippines, according to a Field Museum press release.
Unlike the crowded sands of more popular Luzon beaches like Puerto Galera, Nagasa is usually empty.
This pyramid-like building is the Church of San Agustin in Paoay in the Northern Luzon.
